{{Quote|If you or your father ever need a place...look me up on Vedis IV.|Toob Ancher to [[Drake Paulsen]]|<ref name="J2">{{JournalCite|2|Out of the Cradle}}</ref>}}
'''Vedis IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Vedis system/Legends|Vedis system]], which was part of the [[Mayagil sector/Legends|Mayagil sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Atlas" /> Around [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Toob Ancher]] was known to have left [[Soco-Jarel Spaceport]] with the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 transport]] [[Glory (YT-1300 light freighter)|''Glory'']] to reach the planet.<ref name="J2" /> Vedis IV was also where another smuggler named [[Lu Esi]] [[Death/Legends|died]] when he crashed his [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] into the planet while being chased by [[Sector/Legends|sector]] authorities.<ref name="J5">{{JournalCite|5|A Bitter Winter}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Vedis IV was first mentioned in the [[May 1]], [[1994]]'s short story ''[[Out of the Cradle]]'', written by [[Patricia A. Jackson]] and published within [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]].<ref name="J2" /> ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the [[Vedis system/Legends|Vedis system]] in grid square N-18.<ref name="Atlas" />
